name: Countdown Timer
description: Calculate the exact time remaining until any future event — in days, hours, minutes, and weeks.

formulas.daysLeft: max(0, floor(((targetYear*525960 + targetMonth*43800 + targetDay*1440 + targetHour*60) - (startYear*525960 + startMonth*43800 + startDay*1440 + startHour*60)) / 1440))
formulas.hoursLeft: max(0, floor(mod(abs((targetYear*525960 + targetMonth*43800 + targetDay*1440 + targetHour*60) - (startYear*525960 + startMonth*43800 + startDay*1440 + startHour*60)), 1440) / 60))
formulas.minutesLeft: max(0, mod(abs((targetYear*525960 + targetMonth*43800 + targetDay*1440 + targetHour*60) - (startYear*525960 + startMonth*43800 + startDay*1440 + startHour*60)), 60))
formulas.weeksLeft: max(0, ((targetYear*525960 + targetMonth*43800 + targetDay*1440 + targetHour*60) - (startYear*525960 + startMonth*43800 + startDay*1440 + startHour*60)) / 10080)
formulas.totalHours: max(0, ((targetYear*525960 + targetMonth*43800 + targetDay*1440 + targetHour*60) - (startYear*525960 + startMonth*43800 + startDay*1440 + startHour*60)) / 60)
